note: Added systemSent bool to acpSession. sendOnce now prepends spec.System as a leading TextBlock on the first Prompt call of each opened/recovered session (acp.go:205-214). recover() resets systemSent=false so the re-opened session re-injects the persona identity on its first replay (acp.go:244). Added TestSend_SystemPromptInjected in acp_test.go to assert 2 blocks on the first call and 1 block on subsequent calls. fakeAgent.receivedBlocks captures each Prompt call's content for assertion.
